column1: # After the first real ZAP scan, review zap-report.json and add any
# additional pluginid values that are confirmed false positives.

column3: Timestamp Disclosure — /health intentionally returns uptime and timestamp fields
Storable and Cacheable Content — informational only, applies to static assets
Suspicious Comments — dev-mode source map comments, not a production data leak
X-Content-Type-Options Missing — review after first scan; may be absent on some routes
CSP Scanner — Content Security Policy informational finding, not blocking
